Scope.description: The type of trend (e.g. Last 5 games; Last 10 games; Last 5 home games; etc.)

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

OpponentID.description: The TeamID of the opposing team related to the scop of the search

Opponent.description: The name [Key] of the team's opponent related to the scop of the search

Wins.description: The total number of wins by the team relating to the scope

Losses.description: Team losses relating to the scope

Ties.description: Ties by a team relating to the scope of the search

WinsAgainstTheSpread.description: Total number of wins against the run line relating to the scope

LossesAgainstTheSpread.description: Team losses against the run line relating to the scope

PushesAgainstTheSpread.description: The amount of times a given team's final score of their game has pushed the run line (a push is neither a win nor a loss)

Overs.description: Amount of times the total score goes over the OverUnder

Unders.description: Amount of times the total score goes under the OverUnder

OverUnderPushes.description: The amount of times a given team's final score of their game has pushed the point total (a push is neither a win nor a loss)

AverageOpponentScore.description: Average score of the opposing team
